headline: **MLB Daily Roundup: May 15, 2026**
article:
The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 loss to the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Ryan O'Hearn leading the Rockies' offense. The Washington Nationals were defeated by the Cincinnati Reds 15-1, marking a historic loss. The New York Mets secured a 9-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Nolan McLean earning the win.

Several key players have been impacted by injuries. Cal Raleigh has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right oblique strain with the Seattle Mariners. Jimmy Herget has been placed on the 15-day injured list retroactive to May 13, 2026, with the Colorado Rockies, due to a right shoulder impingement. Other notable injuries include Brooks Kriske with the Athletics, Robby Snelling with the Miami Marlins, Francisco Alvarez with the New York Mets, Rhett Lowder with the Cincinnati Reds, Drew Pomeranz with the Los Angeles Angels, and Dylan Beavers with the Baltimore Orioles.

The Oakland Athletics have bolstered their pitching staff with the addition of left-handed pitcher José Suarez, acquired from the Seattle Mariners in exchange for cash. The Athletics' roster now includes José Suarez. Other notable roster movements include the Arizona Diamondbacks acquiring Jose Requena from the Los Angeles Dodgers and the San Francisco Giants trading Patrick Bailey to the Cleveland Guardians for Matt Wilkinson and other considerations.

top_news.title: **Rockies Fall to Pirates in 7-2 Loss**
top_news.summary: The Colorado Rockies suffered a 7-2 defeat at the hands of the Pittsburgh Pirates, with Ryan O'Hearn leading the Rockies' offense with 3 hits, 1 home run, and 2 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Nationals Suffer Historic Loss to Reds**
top_news.summary: The Washington Nationals were defeated by the Cincinnati Reds 15-1, marking a lopsided final score. JJ Bleday led the Nationals' offense with 3 hits, 2 home runs, and 6 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Mets Take Down Tigers 9-4**
top_news.summary: The New York Mets secured a 9-4 victory over the Detroit Tigers, with Nolan McLean earning the win after pitching 7.0 innings with 7 strikeouts. Gage Workman led the Tigers' offense with 2 hits, 1 home run, and 3 RBIs.

top_news.title: **Twins Rout Marlins 9-1**
top_news.summary: The Minnesota Twins dominated the Miami Marlins, securing a 9-1 victory. Austin Martin led the Twins' offense with 2 hits, 3 RBIs, and a key single that scored James Outman.

top_news.title: **Raleigh Lands on Injured List**
top_news.summary: Seattle Mariners catcher Cal Raleigh has been placed on the 10-day injured list due to a right oblique strain.

top_news.title: **Athletics Acquire LHP José Suarez in Trade**
top_news.summary: The Oakland Athletics have bolstered their pitching staff with the addition of left-handed pitcher José Suarez, acquired from the Seattle Mariners in exchange for cash. Suarez joins the Athletics' roster following the trade.
